title: Alter table to add Fkey....
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(512), PRIMARY KEY (id));
CREATE TABLE t5 (ref_id INTEGER, value FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY (ref_id));
ALTER TABLE t5 ADD CONSTRAINT fk_t5_ref_id_t4_id FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t4(id);
key_bug_features: Adding foreign key constraints to existing tables
